MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR OCT-26-2015 VACATED. ELIZABETH PEDERSN, COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTRY OF SAN FRANCISCO, APPEARED AND INFORMED THE COURT THAT A DISMISSAL HAS BEEN FILED BY THE PLAINTIFF ON 10/23/15. COUNSEL STATED IN OPEN COURT THAT THEY OBJECT TO THE PART OF THE DISMISSAL INDICATING THAT ALL PARTIES TO BEAR THEIR OWN FEES AND COSTS AND INFORMED THE COURT THAT PLAINTIFF WILL FILE AN AMENDED DISMISSAL TO CORRECT THE ISSUE. JUDGE: JOHN K. STEWART; CLERK: JIROQUE; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
